introSection: Hoverla is a steel roller coaster located at Tsentralʹnyy Park Kulʹtury in Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ukraine. This roller coaster was manufactured by Analog and opened in 2012.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a compact layout with a single vertical loop.

sections.title: Colour Scheme
sections.content: The ride has yellow track and light blue supports, the colors of the Ukranian flag.

fullText:
Hoverla is a steel roller coaster located at Tsentralʹnyy Park Kulʹtury in Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ukraine. This roller coaster was manufactured by Analog and opened in 2012.

The ride has a compact layout with a single vertical loop.

The ride has yellow track and light blue supports, the colors of the Ukranian flag.
